name: alfanous
description: Quranic search engine supporting Arabic text, transliteration, phrase search, wildcards, and more.

tools.name: search_quran
tools.description: Search for verses in the Holy Qur'an. Supports Arabic text, Buckwalter transliteration, boolean operators, phrase search, wildcards, field filters, and fuzzy matching.

tools.name: get_quran_info
tools.description: Retrieve metadata about the Qur'an such as chapter names, available translations, recitations, search field names, and API defaults.

tools.name: suggest_query
tools.description: Get auto-completion suggestions for a partial Quranic search query.
